title: athyrium brevifrons
intro: Athyrium brevifrons, also known as the Japanese lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family, native to Japan and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant contains compounds that exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its health benefits, which include reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, Athyrium brevifrons is often dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
